---
name: Maintenance/Chore Request
about: Request technical maintenance or project cleanup
title: "[CHORE] "
labels: maintenance, documentation
assignees: ''

---

**Is your request related to a specific part of the project?**
Ex. API dependencies, CI/CD pipeline, Docker configuration, etc.

**Describe the technical task**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance or chore task that needs to be performed.

**Why is this task necessary?**
Explain the benefit of this task (e.g., improving build speed, reducing technical debt, updating outdated packages).

**Proposed implementation (optional)**
If you have an idea of how to implement this, please describe it here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or links to documentation here.
